text_block_list.text: On a certain day before the Arima Kinen ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —Ohh～ the snow has become quite deep.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I think we can still walk through it. 
You still good?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Alright, then let's make it in one go!

……For why I'm here deep in this snowy 
forest with Stay Gold, we're going to 
have to rewind a little ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking of going to 
see the snow this time.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Alright, see you later～

……Despite looking back on it, I still 
don't really know the reason why 
we're here.

This is a common occurrence when 
I'm her so I don't think I'll give it too 
much thoug——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oiiii, you'll get left behind～
choice_data_list: Ah, my bad! Catching up now!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Niiice, we made it, we made it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…and the decorations are amazing. 
Oh yeah, Christmas is soon isn't it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I got connections with the owner of this 
log house. Ever since I helped him out 
one time on a trip, he lets me use it 
from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The snowy view from here is truly 
something, I've grown a bit attached 
to it. Let's watch the view while we 
sit by the fireplace today.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——Man～ I didn't think the owner would 
be so kind as to prepare food for us.
choice_data_list: Cake and chicken… It's a party!
Cake and chicken… It's a party!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Maybe it's because I told 
them I would be bringing a travel 
companion this time.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Regardless, I will be thankfully partaking.

Surrounded by extravagant food, Stay 
Gold and I lazed around for a while ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
………Even so, many things have 
happened on this journey hey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
To have aimed for a journey with an 
unknown destination… To have risen 
onto a dreamlike stage…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
To have stood against a great storm… To 
have traversed this chaotic journey…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
To have faced many situations with an 
ultimatum…… To have made all sorts of 
discoveries……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
To have experienced my first joys… and to 
have recalled my moments of desolation… 
Truly, a lot has happened.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……In a way, I may have already found 
my "New Gold" throughout this journey.
choice_data_list: $(scale 90)The Arima Kinen may have even greater gold

text_block_list.text:
This is for sure. Stay Gold's one and 
only "New Gold" will be waiting at the 
finish line of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …You're right.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The next "Arima Kinen" may as well draw the 
finish line for my journey. That's why ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'll be having you accompany me till 
the very end, as my travelling partner.

…And so, the sound of glasses clinking 
chimed through the room.

The snow outside was not that of a 
blanketing blizzard, but it changed to 
a fluttery wonderland, as if sending 
blessings towards our goal ahead.

…And so, the sound of glasses clinking 
chimed through the room.

The snow outside was not that of a path 
blocking blizzard, but changed to a 
fluttery wonderland, as if sending 
blessings to our goal ahead.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……Now then. We should probably 
start thinking about when we're 
going to head back～

As Christmas was coming up, I handed the 
gift I secretly bought to Stay Gold——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: This is…… A charm?
choice_data_list: I imagined you'd use it on your bag

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh～ it's a bear motif. Metallic and it seems pretty study, it's a good design.
choice_data_list: It's also a charm for safe travels ahead

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohh, this really is something for me then.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll use it with care.
choice_data_list: (…Thank goodness, she seems to like it)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that look of relief on your face?

The thought of giving someone like her who 
travels so much a physical item did worry 
me a little, so when I told her this——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ………I see.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Alright, wait for me for one moment.

Despite the falling snow outside, Stay Gold 
suddenly rushed outside! I was thinking of 
following after her but ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It's all good! I'll return soon!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: and, it's complete.

Stay Gold brought in a thick and dry branch 
from outside, and before I could finish my 
next thought, she used her knife to carve 
out a little bear!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'll give this to you. If you leave it on your 
desk, it might ward off some bad omens 
for you.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Would you accept it?
choice_data_list: Of course! Thank you! I will treasure this

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ————Why's that?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Why would you accept it, then treasure it?
choice_data_list: That's… It's because it's from you——
That's… It's because it's from you——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It's the same for me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's because it's something I received from 
you, I will gladly accept it and treasure it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It's about time isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Ah～ Even then, this was only something 
improvised from me, it might go bad pretty 
soon.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
If you want a new one then let me know. 
I'll carve you another one if I'm up for it.

If that time ever comes, I wonder what 
kind of bear Stay Gold would carve for 
me next time.

Well…… That's to say, it's something to 
look forward to in some future ahead ——
